plugins.name: kemb
plugins.description: Kemb combs document corpora into agent-ready form. Point Claude at a directory of PDFs; probe the tree, draft a corpus plan (inventory, taxonomy, cost), and on approval execute a pass that classifies, routes, parses, and renders documents into a markdown mirror with hash-stamped frontmatter and a queryable manifest. Single-file parse, extract, classify, and split remain as facets of the kembing process, powered by LlamaCloud where needed.
